instructions: Review entries, then set include_on_site to true. Run: python scripts/generate_html.py

vulnerabilities.title: Lantronix EDS5000
vulnerabilities.name: Lantronix EDS5000 Code Injection Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.description: Lantronix EDS5000 contains a code injection vulnerability that could allow attackers to inject arbitrary OS commands into the username parameter. Injected commands are executed with root privileges.
vulnerabilities.short_description: Lantronix EDS5000 contains a code injection vulnerability that could allow attackers to inject arbitrary OS commands...
vulnerabilities.fix: Apply mitigations in accordance with vendor instructions, ensuring compliance with CISA’s BOD 26-04 Prioritizing Security Updates Based on Risk (see URL in Notes) guidance and CISA’s “Forensics Triage Requirements” (see URL in Notes). Follow applicable BOD 26-04 guidance for cloud services or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Stakeholders are responsible for evaluating each asset's internet exposure and ensuring adherence to BOD 26-04 patching guidelines.

vulnerabilities.title: Ubiquiti UniFi OS
vulnerabilities.name: Ubiquiti UniFi OS Improper Input Validation Vulnerability

vulnerabilities.title: Ubiquiti UniFi OS
vulnerabilities.name: Ubiquiti UniFi OS Path Traversal Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.description: Ubiquiti UniFi OS contains a path traversal vulnerability which could allow a malicious actor with access to the network to access files on the underlying system that could be manipulated to access an underlying account.
